entry_point.FQNAME: com.berat.sakus.data.SbbApiServisi java.lang.Object seferSaatleriGetirByDate(int lineId, java.util.Calendar calendar, kotlin.coroutines.Continuation<? super com.berat.sakus.data.HatSeferBilgisi> $completion)

problem.problem_class: Possibly blocking call in non-blocking context
problem.description: Possibly blocking call in non-blocking context could lead to thread starvation
